content.text: I want to build a modern gaming PC. Can you help me research the best components?
I'd love to help you build a gaming PC! Let's start with the key components. What's your budget, and do you have any preferences for CPU (AMD vs Intel) or GPU (NVIDIA vs AMD)?
My budget is around $1000. I've always been an NVIDIA fan, and I'd like to try AMD for the CPU this time. I also want it to handle 4K gaming.

Great choices! For your $1000 budget targeting 4K gaming, I'd recommend looking at the AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D for the CPU — it's excellent for gaming thanks to its 3D V-Cache. For the GPU, the NVIDIA RTX 4070 Ti Super offers strong 4K performance. You'll also want 32GB of DDR5 RAM, a good B650 or X670 motherboard, and a 1TB NVMe SSD. Want me to put together a full parts list?
Yes, that sounds perfect. Also, I work at AcmeCorp and we get a 25% employee discount on PC components, so I might be able to stretch the budget a bit further.
